unexpected_finds.scope: 069 Phase D NEW substrate (Liouville normal-form invariant)
unexpected_finds.description: 069 Phase D.2.b sympy-derived Liouville normal-form gauge-invariant I_V(z) = (3 z^2 + 5 z - 3) / (9 z^3) — NEW substrate at 069 not present in 058R deposit. Gauge-invariant under the symbolic gauge transformation G(x) that the R1-gated Phase D.2.b symbolic step would construct. Forward-pointed for 069r1 R1-closure preflight.
unexpected_finds.significance: Provides a concrete sympy-exact obstruction-class candidate for V_quad's V_quad → P_III(D_6) reduction beyond the H4 / Birkhoff-formal-series substrate. Could be useful for 069r1 path β reconciliation (τ-function reparametrisation) by giving an independent invariant to cross-check against the proposed parameter chart shift.

unexpected_finds.description: 086 R5 lit-hunt verdict READY_PROVISIONAL with R5_RESIDUAL_ONLY caveat surfaces a chart-plurality observation for the master functor Phi target: multiple inequivalent invariant triples (Δ_d, ‖Δ‖_Pet, ξ_0) chartings exist depending on the choice of Petersson-norm representative and ξ_0 normalization convention. This is a forward-pointer for the V0 announcement substrate-level disambiguation but not blocking at 097.
unexpected_finds.significance: Suggests that the M9 V0 announcement may need an explicit normalization-convention block at the assignment-rule level. Phi cross-walk §3 NON_BLOCKING absorbs this as a documented non-blocking drift; M13 follow-up for categorical-level closure.

unexpected_finds.scope: Notational overlap: M5 balanced Δ vs M9 modular Δ_d
unexpected_finds.description: PCF-1 v1.3 §2 uses Δ for the balanced PCF discriminant Δ = β^2 - 4αγ; picture v1.19 §3 P-PET row + 096 §3.1 use Δ_d for the modular discriminant of the associated curve at degree d. Both are named with the symbol Δ throughout the substrate. Documented as PCF identity cross-walk §4.3 DRIFT_DETECTED_NON_BLOCKING.
unexpected_finds.significance: Forward-pointer drafting suggestion for M9 V0 announcement: rebrand to Δ_PCF vs Δ_d^mod to remove the notational overlap at the announcement-facing level. Non-blocking at 097 because the substrate is mutually consistent (both notations defined at their respective milestones with no contradiction); the overlap is a drafting-clarity concern only.
